data.description:
## Why
With the threshold empirically derived (sibling story), flip the serious-tier code-review criteria from advisory-in-everything-but-name to actually able to BLOCK. Today only the two DET criteria (secret-detection, high-critical-security) can block; all 15 LLM criteria ship blocking_enabled: false at 0.95 — locked as the permissive-rollout invariant by ADR 0036 and pinned by tests/unit/test_impact_model_versioning.py::test_code_review_only_det_security_criteria_are_hard_blocks. The field false-block risk is demonstrably near zero (0 finding-blocks in 162 changes).

## What
- In src/rebar/llm/code_review/criteria_routing.json set blocking_enabled: true + block_threshold = the derived value (~0.6, per the sibling story's crossover analysis) for the serious-tier lanes: security, and the criteria whose findings map to the serious prod/maint binaries (data_loss_without_recovery, security_bypass_not_enforced_elsewhere, silent_wrong_feeding_a_decision, unversioned_published_contract_break, safety_net_removal_without_replacement). Everything else stays advisory at 0.95.
- Update ADR 0036 (dated note: permissive rollout concluded for the named tiers, evidence attached) and the pinning test to the new approved blocking set; keep the invariant test asserting NO OTHER criterion blocks.
- Keep pass-3 separation intact: this is a threshold/posture config change only — no decide.py math changes.

## Scope
src/rebar/llm/code_review/criteria_routing.json, tests/unit/test_impact_model_versioning.py, docs/adr/0036-*.md, docs/plan-review-gate.md (the cross-gate posture note). Depends on the derivation story.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] The approved serious-tier criteria have blocking_enabled: true at the derived block_threshold in criteria_routing.json; all other LLM criteria remain advisory at 0.95.
- [ ] The pinning test asserts the NEW approved blocking set and fails on any unapproved addition.
- [ ] ADR 0036 carries a dated enablement note citing the derivation ticket.
- [ ] A replay of the post-recal corpus shows #518-class and #539-class findings now BLOCK while the observed false-block count stays 0.
- [ ] make lint passes on the change.
- [ ] make typecheck passes on the change.
- [ ] make test passes on the change.
data.title: Enable the code-review blocking lane for serious-tier criteria at the derived threshold
